title: Food exposed to floodwater discard boundary
summary: Separate anything touched by floodwater, sewage, chemicals, damaged packaging, rust, swelling, leakage, or broken seals.
content: Separate anything touched by floodwater, sewage, chemicals, damaged packaging, rust, swelling, leakage, or broken seals. Discard unsafe items according to official food-safety guidance and document losses for aid or insurance. Do not wash and reuse food in cardboard, cloth, screw-top, snap-lid, or damaged containers after flood exposure.
